# CWE-524: process-wide cache stores raw session tokens for all users.
lang: go
file: CWE-524-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var (
	tokenCache   = map[string]string{}
	tokenCacheMu sync.Mutex
)

func CacheSessionToken(c *gin.Context) {
	tokenCacheMu.Lock()
	tokenCache[c.GetString("uid")] = c.GetHeader("Authorization")
	tokenCacheMu.Unlock()
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}

func FetchCachedToken(c *gin.Context) {
	tokenCacheMu.Lock()
	tok := tokenCache[c.Query("uid")]
	tokenCacheMu.Unlock()
	c.String(http.StatusOK, tok)
}
